exec_takeaways: Both regions are in a week-over-week revenue decline. US is down -36.7% on the trailing-7-day window and -52.67% day-over-day; EU is down -12.11% on the trailing-7-day and -26.64% day-over-day. Diagnose whether this is calendar-driven (post-Easter pullback) or program-driven (offer fatigue, tracking gap).

EU is running 3.1× the US transaction volume (310 vs 99 MTD) and 1.4× the revenue (€14,156 vs $9,805) on 1.6× the click volume — EU CVR is materially higher (~0.9% vs ~0.46%), driven by a deeper coupon/cashback German-market mix. The arbitrage opportunity is to port the EU coupon/cashback playbook into the US program.

Concentration risk is elevated in both regions. EU: AudienceRun (SideKick + base + Mobile Smart Banner + In-Read = 109 transactions, 35% of total). US: YIELDKIT GmbH alone = 27 of 99 transactions (27%). A single partner's seasonality or technical issue can swing weekly GMV by ±20–30%. Diversification is the #1 risk to manage.

Commission validation backlog is critical: 328 (US) + 441 (EU) = 769 transactions awaiting validation. Stale validation queues delay payout, reduce publisher satisfaction, and inflate apparent revenue if reversed. Clear weekly with a Friday cut-off SLA.

Content GMV is healthy: editorial-content publishers (YIELDKIT, SeekShop, New Terrain Media US; vatago, BMC Medical EU) drive ~35% of US transactions and ~15% of EU. Below the 30–50% benchmark in EU — recruit German-language editorial / SEO publishers as Q2 priority.

BlueAFF, MaxRebates, RetailMeNot (US); GoCashBack (EU). Headroom in EU.

actions_growth: Scale top 3 publishers per region: YIELDKIT (US), Honey, CPAR Media (US); AudienceRun, DEALSAMMLER, CouponCollector (EU). Increase commission +1pp for the next 14 days as a retention lever.
Launch 'ROCK15' US version of the EU exclusive code. Push via Foxtail network in US (SeekShop, CouponBirds, RetailMeNot). Target $2,500 incremental GMV by Apr 23.
Creator seeding wave 2 (US TikTok): ship 10 helmet+light bundles to mid-tier creators (50K–500K followers). Measure first attribution by Apr 30.
Bundle promotion: helmet + light + glove combo at $79 (US) / €79 (EU). Brief top 5 publishers per region.
Diversify EU ad-network mix: identify and onboard 2 alternatives to AudienceRun (e.g. Adcell DACH, Tradedoubler DE) before May 15.
actions_recruit: Target: 30 new pre-qualified publishers next week (15 US / 15 EU) via existing /awin-rockbros-us-outreach + /awin-rockbros-eu-outreach skills.
Focus verticals — US: TikTok creators (cycling vertical), SEO content sites (outdoor / cycling). EU: German-language editorial cycling sites, Italian / Spanish coupon sites.
Outbound 5 direct emails to top 5 cycling YouTubers (>500K subs) with $200 sample + 20% commission proposal.
Filter incoming Awin Marketplace applicants — auto-decline <50 accepted partnerships (per existing quality gate).
actions_optimize: Tracking & pixel audit (US site): validate Awin pixel firing on /checkout/success, mobile + desktop, Apr 21 SLA. Engineering ticket open by Apr 17.
Offer A/B test: 15% off (current) vs $10 off vs free shipping. 7-day rolling test, top 3 cashback partners, week 17.
Landing page CRO — bring helmet bundle to /collections/cycling-bundle in both US and EU stores. PDP review for trust badges + reviews above the fold.
Clear 769-commission validation backlog by Friday Apr 18. Block 2-hour ops window each Friday going forward.
Brief top 5 publishers per region with refreshed creative pack (Q2 hero imagery, 5 angles). Send Apr 17.
